### Post by RudolfMDLT on 2007-09-30

I can't get these my windows borders to work! On my previous install feisty Beryl worked a charm - but now that I'm running Kubuntu, all the effects work, just no window borders. I have searched around on the forum and haven't been able to fix it - any help will greatly be appreciated! 

thanks,

Rudolf

### Post by Linicks on 2007-09-30
I had this once, and if you right mouse click on the application in the panel, select  [un]minimise*, then do the same again but select [un]maximise*, I found the toolbar borders came back - and never again did I lose them.

Nick
* or a combination of these window options.

---

### Post by RudolfMDLT on 2007-09-30
Very random advice!.... and it worked! Cool! Thanks!

But It only works with KDE-Window-Manager and not with emerald.

Any advice on how to get emerald to work?

Thanks for any help!
